31580.title: Antiques Roadshow : Erddig 2
31580.description: Fiona Bruce and the experts welcome thousands of visitors to Erddig in north Wales, the home of the Yorke family. Treasures turning up include a mourning ring connected to Charlotte Bronte and a Welsh love spoon handed down through the generations.

31581.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : In My Memory Lock'd
31581.description: Frank and Lu have a mystery to solve when a man with no recollection of who he is or where he came from wanders into their lives.

31582.title: Our Girl : Nigeria, Belize and Bangladesh Tours: Episode 4

31585.title: Impossible
31585.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

31586.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : This Promised End
31586.description: Frank and Lu race against the clock when an undertaker is given only 24 hours to live by two mysterious hitmen.

31587.title: Bargain Hunt : Hemswell 26
31587.description: Anita Manning presents from the Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire, with experts Christina Trevanion and Nick Hall. A team of best friends take on a married couple to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction.

31588.title: Bad Move : Get Lost
31588.description: Nicky and Steve are alarmed to discover that an ancient public right of way runs through their garden. Grizzo is preoccupied with a new tapping craze.

31589.title: Keeping Up Appearances : The Mayor's Fancy Dress Ball
31589.description: Super snob Hyacinth suddenly has a lot on her hands - attending the Mayor's fancy dress ball and getting to know an important new neighbour.

31591.description: Callum can't open up to Ben, Kat comes up with a business idea, and Vi meddles in the Highway marriage.

31595.title: Bargain Hunt : Lincoln 6
31595.description: Charlie Ross presents from the Lincolnshire Antiques and Home show. Helping out the teams are experts Raj Bisram and Kate Bliss. Meanwhile, Charlie hears about a devastating extreme weather event that destroyed Louth in 1920.

31611.title: EastEnders
31611.description: Lola is worried when Isaac tells a lie, Callum confides in the wrong person, Bernie starts to feel the pressure, and Linda knows that the truth will soon be out.

31612.title: Mary Berry Cooks : Sunday Lunch
31612.description: Mary cooks for a relaxed and informal family get-together, with dishes including a slow-roast shoulder of lamb with rosemary and paprika rub, potato and fennel gratin, plum tarte tatin and delicious fruit salad.

31613.title: Call the Midwife
31613.description: Valerie tries to help a struggling mother to accept her son's birth defect, and the Turners oversee a measles vaccination trial at the clinic. Meanwhile, Nurse Crane is determined to make the most of the Whitsun bank holiday.

31614.title: Summer of Rockets
31614.description: During the tumultuous summer of 1958, Samuel prepares to launch his new invention, which is attracting some suspicious followers, before meeting the mysterious Kathleen.

31615.title: Father Brown : The House of God
31615.description: Suspicions abound when, in a shocking turn of events, the holiest house in Kembleford is linked to the death of a woman.
